title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at DB Schenker India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at DB Schenker India
jsonLd.description:
DB Schenker India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DB Schenker India:
DB Schenker India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DB Schenker India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
